titleStmt.title: SII 27.68: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 68. (A.R. No. 303 of 1931-32.) ŚĪRIYĀRA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This record registers a gift of land free from taxes as also money income to god Nārāyaṇadēva, by mahāpradhāna Śaṅkaradēva governor of Bārakūru-rājya, for the welfare of the king, who was ruling from Dōrasamudra. The gift land appears to have been purchased by the donor from out of the kāṇike etc., paid by the halaru of hattu-kēri and others.
It is dated Śaka 1319, Dhātu, Māgha śu. 12, Wednesday corresponding to 1397 A.D., January 10, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·01. The Śaka year was current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara
cāravē trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svasti śrī
manmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara śrī vīra harihara mahārāyaru dōrasamudrada
nelebīḍi nōḷirddu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ Ēkachatradiṁ rājyava pratipā
ḷisutaṁ yiralu śrī manmahāpradhāna śaṁkhara dēvagaḷu
ranirūpadiṁ bārakūrarājadhāniyalu yidda svasti śrī jayābhyudaya
śakavaruṣa 1319 neya dhātu saṁvatsarada māgha śu 12 bu vāra
ttukēriya halaru haṁjamana sātaḷigeya toḷaharu modalāda sama
sta kaṭṭaḷeyavarige barasikoṭṭa śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare niṁma
kaṭṭida kāṇikeya hoṁnna nīvellaru tettalli niṁ tējamāṁnya saṁka
tappadeṁdu hattukēri vokkala tegeda saṁmaṁdha Ā halara vokkala
rāyara nirūpadiṁ maṇṇamāṁnya hoṁna javaḷiyāgi hattukēri kaṭṭaḷeya
ha nārāyaṇa dēvarige Ācaṁdrārkka sthāyiyāgi naḍava hāgi Ā śaṁkharadēvagaḷu
barasikoṭṭa siriyaṁṇeya haravara Aharavariya catusīmekuṁ niya baḷiyavara
bāḷiṁ paḍuvalu saumyadēvara dēvasvada Upūra kaḷigaḍiṁ baḍagalu narasiṁga se
ṭṭiya gaḍiya teṁgina sasi sahita mūḍalu hebārakaḷigaḍiya yiśāṁnyada
Agaḷu hola sahita teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyoḷaguḷa haravariyaṁ
varuṣaṁ prati bāha bhattabaḷa 40 le mūḍe 25 mēlāyadiṁda kāṇike hoṁnu saha
vāgi Alli Uḷaṁthā Āḷubāḷubeṭṭu ṭṭe nidhinikṣēpajala pāṣāṇa sahitavāgi E
nu Uḷaṁdhā sarvvasvāṁmyavanu sarvvamāṁnyavāgi Ā śaṁkharadēvagaḷu rāyara nirū
padiṁ halaru kaṭṭaḷeyavarige dhārāyaneṟadukoṭṭu Aharavari Akara Aṁnyā
ya Anāya teṟu siddhāya Enebiḍārasalladeṁdu kaḷadu barasi koṭṭa śilā śā
sana A barasikoṭṭa haravariyanu A halaru kaṭṭaḷeyavaru taṁma kulasvāmi
yaha śrīnārāyaṇa dēvaralli rāyarige lēsa haṁtāgi haṁneraḍu maṁdi brā
hmaṇa bhōjanake varu 1 kaṁ bhattamū 300 dēvara Amrutapaḍige bhattamū 25 mēlā
yadiṁ kāṭiga 30 hoṁnanu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍava hāṁge māḍi
da dharṁmmakke Aḷupidavarugaḷu vāraṇāsiyalli sahasrakavileya ko
ṁda dōṣake hōharu yidana ṟitu dharṁmmavanu pālsutiralāgi
nārāyaṇadēvaru rakṣisutiharu yidharmmavanu nārāyaṇadēvara Ānaṁ
dānubhava ceṁnappa Ayyanavaru pāripatyavamāḍi naḍasi koḍiharu
yi dharṁmmakke barasida śilāśāsanakke jayamaṁgaḷa śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
